title: Repair stale distribution-lane latest truth detection for the scheduled post-hold rerun
goal: Improve the 2026-05-28 post-hold marketer rerun by fail-closing when distribution_lane_latest.json points at a stale latest-artifact snapshot.

changes.summary: Added freshness verification for distribution_lane_latest.json, including alias mtime and its referenced artifact Generated timestamp, and made active hold certification fail closed when that latest surface is stale.
Added regression coverage proving the verifier rejects stale distribution-lane latest truth during an active hold and still accepts a fresh lane artifact.
Refreshed the latest distribution-lane truth surface so the current scheduled rerun reads the real 2026-05-28 selection snapshot.
Refreshed the paired execution-board latest snapshot to keep hold-window truth surfaces aligned.

results: Targeted marketing loop certification tests passed with the new stale-distribution-lane guard.
distribution_lane_latest.json now points at /home/mistlight/.openclaw/workspace/drafts/2026-05-28_distribution_action_brief.md instead of the stale 2026-05-25 snapshot.
outcome_execution_board_latest.json now reports timestamp 2026-05-28T06:33:46.708167 and execution_board_path /home/mistlight/.openclaw/workspace/drafts/2026-05-28_marketing_execution_board.md.

current_truth.why_this_slot: The execution board still had no truthful do-now packet, the post-hold rerun was already scheduled, and improving that rerun's fail-closed truth inputs was the highest-leverage executable move.
